title: PLabel Method, Spel Class
syntax:
Function PLabel (PointNumber As Integer) As String

Sub PLabel (PointNumber As Integer, PointName As String)
parameters:
PointNumber	Integer number representing the point
		 number.

PointName	String expression representing the label
		 to use for the specified point.
description: Gets or sets the point label associated with a point number.
examples:
Dim pt1Label As String
Pt1Label = m_spel.PLabel(1)
